SUSTAINABILITY Our World FAQS BASE RUM BACARDÍ Spiced rum COCKTAILS Spiced & Cola A fun twist on the classic rum and Coke, BACARDÍ Spiced & Cola is a party pleaser that's sure to surprise the tastebuds. Get set to spice things up. VIDEO HOW TO MAKE A SPICED & COLA BACARDÍ Spiced features warm flavours of vanilla, cinnamon and spices. How to make a Spiced & Cola 50 ml BACARDÍ Spiced rum 100 ml cola Servings Copy Spiced & Cola ingredients Copied! Spiced & Cola Recipe One step at a time 1 Chill Fill a highball glass with cubed ice. 2 Pour Pour in the BACARDÍ Spiced. 3 Fizz Add the chilled cola. 4 Stir Give it all a gentle stir. MERCHANDISE GET KITTED OUT Glasses. Squeezers. Cocktail kits. Discover everything you need to create standout BACARDÍ cocktails. SHOP NOW OUR RECOMMENDED RUM COCKTAILS Like This? Try These If this is your kind of cocktail, here’s our selection of other BACARDÍ cocktails that might suit your taste VIEW ALL RUM COCKTAILS Rum Mule Tormenta Negra BACARDÍ & Cola Cuatro Highball Cuba Libre DRAG TO DISCOVER MORE VIEW ALL RUM COCKTAILS SOCIAL MOVE WITH US A soft sway, or a lively dance. We have something for everyone. Follow us on social to stay up-to-date with the latest BACARDÍ news. #DoWhatMovesYou FAQ WANT TO KNOW MORE? What is spiced rum? Spiced rum is often aged for as long as dark rum, but has added spices and caramel coloring. It usually carries a bold, yet smooth taste. What kind of cola should I use in a rum and cola cocktail? You can use any kind of cola in a rum and cola cocktail, as long as your taste buds fancy it! What type of rum goes in a rum and cola cocktail? Usually, rum and cola cocktails use a light white rum that’s great for mixing, such as BACARDÍ Superior – but you can use BACARDÍ Spiced rum for that perfect remix.
